benefits.description: Eliminated early waking (3-4:30am), sleep extended from 4 hours to 8 hours straight through

side_effects.description: Light sweating at night when dosed at 7pm; early waking and fragmented sleep returned when dose increased to 200mcg and timing moved to 6:30pm

protocol_notes: 49F on Retatrutide 3mg/week experiencing glucagon-induced early waking. Epitalon microdosing 100mcg at 5pm produced best results. Higher dose 200mcg caused stimulation and sleep disruption. Stack includes melatonin 0.5-1mg + L-Theanine 200mg. Plan: 2-3 months on 5 days on/2 days off cycle, then 1 month break before restarting. Previously took Retatrutide without sleep issues but husband (62F) had chronic early waking.
